name: French Onion Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup No Fat French Onion Dip
1 3-4 lb. frying chicken, cut in 8 pieces, skinned
1 cup crushed low fat butter flavored crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, stir together the onion dip and milk until well combined.
3. Place the chicken pieces in a 13x9 inch baking dish.
4. Spoon the dip mixture over each piece of chicken.
5. Sprinkle the crushed crackers evenly over the chicken pieces.
6. Drizzle the melted butter over the top of the chicken.
7. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and tender to the touch.
Variation: For added flavor, sprinkle 1 teaspoon of dried parsley flakes over the crumb mixture before baking.
